title: neltuma rojasiana
intro: Neltuma rojasiana, also known as the red neltuma or Neltuma rojasiana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiparasitic and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves and roots of Neltuma rojasiana are used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which have been reported to provide health benefits, including relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues.
